sub_modules.fp_multiplier_unpack: Combinational operand decoder that extracts sign, exponent, mantissa, IEEE-754 class information, effective significand, and unbiased exponent.
sub_modules.fp_multiplier_special_cases: Combinational special-case handler for NaNs, infinities, zero operands, invalid operations, and testbench-defined exception flags.
sub_modules.fp_multiplier_significand_product: Combinational datapath block that multiplies the two significands and adds the unbiased exponents.
sub_modules.fp_multiplier_normalize_round_pack: Combinational finite-result stage that detects the leading bit, normalizes, applies rounding mode, detects overflow/flush-to-zero underflow, and packs the final floating-point result.
